testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All tests were created correctly from scratch.

criteria.criterion: src/prompts/builder.ts exports PromptBuilder class with fluent API
PromptBuilder.build() returns Promise<string> and supports async file loading
Section precedence enforced: constitution → role task → story context → isolation rules → context md → conventions footer
Non-overridable sections (isolation rules, story context, conventions footer) cannot be removed
src/prompts/types.ts exports PromptRole, PromptSection interface, PromptOptions type
Unit tests verify section order, non-overridable sections, and override fallthrough

fixes.issue: Import statement ordering and string concatenation style
fixes.action: Fixed import ordering (node imports before local type imports) and converted string concatenation to template literals in buildIsolationRules function
Fixed import ordering and multi-line ternary operator formatting

reasoning: All 22 tests pass without modification. The implementation is clean, follows conventions, and meets all acceptance criteria. The code uses proper TypeScript typing, Bun-native APIs, and immutability patterns. Minor formatting issues were fixed via Biome linter. The PromptBuilder class provides a fluent API with proper section ordering, non-overridable sections are enforced, and override fallthrough works correctly.
